dream_text: A yellow elevator. My old school. Someone was carrying a fish. Then I was suddenly on a train with no shoes.

insight.notice: This reads as a handful of vivid snapshots rather than one clear story: a yellow elevator, your old school, a carried fish, and being shoeless on a train. With no named feeling or connection between them, there isn’t enough here to draw a firm thread.
